integrity.description: The agent interacted with the CRM via the web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser interface of the CRM being navigated and clicked, rather than terminal windows executing SQL or cURL commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard CRM interface is visible (menus, subpanels, standard layout) rather than a text editor or a locally mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by running a script to update the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is either not visible or does not show database modification commands (like `mysql -u ...` or python scripts) being executed to update the campaign or link the opportunities.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Campaign: 'Spring Tech Conference'. Expected Actual Cost: $4,500.00 (4500.0). Target Opportunities to link: 'Alpha Tech Upgrade', 'Beta Corp License', and 'Gamma LLC Support'.
